Product Range

Product TOG Options Sizes Key Fabric
Classic Baby Sleeping Bag 0.5 / 1.0 / 2.5 / 3.5 NB / 0–6M / 6–12M / 12–18M Organic cotton shell
Bamboo Sleeping Bag 0.5 / 1.0 NB / 0–6M / 6–12M / 12–18M Bamboo jersey
Knit Sleeping Sack 1.0 / 2.5 NB / 0–6M / 6–12M / 12–18M Bamboo jersey / organic cotton jersey
Weighted Sleeping Bag Custom 0–6M / 6–12M / 12–18M Cotton twill + filler

How We Work

  1. Send Your Inquiry
    Email us your product reference, target TOG, fabric preference, and estimated order quantity.
  2. Receive FOB Quote
    We respond within 1 business day with itemized pricing, fabric options, and lead times.
  3. Sample Development
    Pre-production sample made to your specs. Physical sample shipped for your approval.
  4. Bulk Production
    Production begins after sample sign-off and deposit. AQL inspection before shipment.

Ready to Source Baby Sleeping Bags?

Send us your specs — TOG rating, fabric, quantity, and target price. We reply within 24 hours.
